mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.role_id AS roleId, u.login_id AS loginId, u.user_name AS userName, u.email AS email, u.password_hash AS passwordHash, u.is_active AS active, r.role_code AS roleCode FROM users u INNER JOIN roles r ON u.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId} AND u.is_active = TRUE AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
